backend/main.mo: Defines content, audition, and staffing types along with state for content items and scheduling in a Motoko actor.
feature_evidence.json: Lists implemented features with affected files, components, and test IDs for UI pass updates and selectable pass functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides high-level summaries of numerous frontend files including sections, pages, layout components, and data modules.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining theme variables, dark mode tokens, and global element styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application wiring routing, global providers, audio management, and all major site sections and pages.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Handles looping background audio with autoplay fallback logic, user preferences, and gesture-based start exposure.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: UI controls for toggling audio and adjusting volume, including handling autoplay-blocked states.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays an access denied message with a warning alert for unauthorized CMS access.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Provides a login/logout button integrating Internet Identity with loading and error handling states.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Shows a modal prompting new authenticated users to enter and save their profile name.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable section wrapper with title, subtitle, optional icon, and layout styling.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Renders the site footer with a haunt warning alert and attribution links.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Implements the sticky header with navigation, mobile menu, scroll effects, and login/sound controls.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Shows a fullscreen video player overlay with play, pause, mute, and close controls.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutAt: Section describing the attraction’s building and lore with imagery and styled content.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Displays a grid of audition perks with icons, titles, and descriptions.
Provides signup entry cards for scare actor and dancer auditions with callbacks for each option.
Dialog form for dancer audition submissions with validation, login handling, and mutation submission.
Dialog form for scare actor audition submissions including validation, authentication, and submit logic.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Presents audition info, warnings, roles, images, and links to specific audition signup flows.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Renders a themed section with an image and description of the Clown Town interior. Uses a card layout with a horror-style title and narrative text.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Displays a grid of food booths with images, alerts, and navigation handlers. Includes logic for routing and fallback image lookup.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Shows haunted house cards with images, descriptions, and buttons linking to rules or specific house pages. Implements name‑based routing and image selection.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Hero section with background video, logo, intro text, and buttons linking to audition sections. Includes simple navigation helpers.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Interactive intro video card with autoplay handling, mute toggle, fullscreen behavior, and fallback overlay. Triggers an audio cue when the video ends.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Section presenting a procession image with title and descriptive text about the nightly parade. Uses card layout with a horror theme.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Shows operating hours, ticket info, pass selector, and warnings. Includes alerts and structured cards for visitor information.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Renders the merch storefront with a featured booth image, category filters, and a grid of product cards. Handles image errors and dynamic filtering by category.
frontend/src/components/sections/passes/: Exports structured data defining available pass options with IDs, pricing, and descriptions.
UI component for selecting a pass option and confirming selection with a temporary alert.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Displays scare zones with images, descriptions, and buttons linking to rules or details. Includes routing logic based on zone name and hover visual effects.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Shows sneak peeks for selected haunted houses with images, descriptions, and navigation links. Builds a list of preview cards from content data.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Lists live shows with images, descriptions, and optional season badges. Includes image loading error handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: Implements a media carousel with images and videos, autoplay support, fullscreen handling, and slide navigation. Manages errors and thumbnail-based slide selection.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Introduces two upcoming 2027 haunted houses with themed cards and teaser descriptions. Uses styled components and iconography for presentation.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Shows a simple teaser card announcing future content with decorative styling. Contains only static text and visuals.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Renders the upcoming events section with event cards, image gallery, and optional navigation to event details.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: React component rendering layered animated horror-themed background effects with images, gradients, noise, and scanlines.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Defines a list of themed food booths with names, taglines, descriptions, and menu items.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Exports mapped paths to generated images for haunted houses, scare zones, food booths, auditions, shows, and events.
frontend/src/content/guestRules.ts: Contains structured safety, behavior, and health rules for various haunted-house attractions.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Provides detailed descriptions and metadata for multiple haunted house attractions.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Lists merchandise shops with basic item descriptions, prices, and a general note.
frontend/src/content/merchStorefront.ts: Defines merch product interfaces, categories, and a full catalog of clothing, posters, and plushie items.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports an array of detailed scare‑zone descriptions for multiple themed horror areas.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Provides metadata and descriptive text for the Schoolhouse Haunted House sneak‑peek section.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Lists entertainment show descriptions with seasonality flags.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Defines slider item interface and a set of images/videos plus title metadata for the Sliders of Decade feature.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Contains structured data for upcoming events including descriptions and date metadata.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the authenticated/anonymous backend actor and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionLinks.ts: React hook to fetch audition links from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Provides mutation hooks to submit scare‑actor and dancer audition forms after mapping minimal UI fields to backend formats.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Hooks for fetching caller role, admin status, and user profile using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: Hook that auto-plays a video element, tracks playback/autoplay errors, and exposes play/pause controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, deleting, and seeding content items through an actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Hook to manage entering, exiting, and toggling fullscreen mode for a referenced DOM element.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication, login state, and stored identities.
React Query hooks to fetch and update the main haunt schedule via the actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: Hook managing sound settings (enabled and volume) with persistence in localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind-based stylesheet defining horror-themed color variables, fonts, and universal white text overrides.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Utility functions to format dates, content types, and type-specific fields for display.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity provider before rendering the app.
frontend/src/pages/ActorsPage.tsx: Renders an actors-only staffing info page with authentication gates, loading states, and data fetched from an actor canister.
frontend/src/pages/AuditionsPage.tsx: Displays audition links with loading and error handling, filtering out placeholder URLs and showing a hiring banner.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Builds an event calendar by grouping content items by date, supporting filtering, hash-based navigation, and item detail dialogs.
Shows details and menu for the Candy Cane Carnage food booth, including image, description, and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/ChainsawColdPage.tsx: Displays the Chainsaw Cold scare zone with images, warnings, description, and navigation to zone rules.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Presents a preview page for the Clown Town haunted house with image, tagline, description, and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Admin CMS page that manages content items and main haunt schedule, including create, update, delete, and seeding operations.
frontend/src/pages/DancerAuditionPage.ts: Form page for submitting dancer audition applications with validation, authentication checks, and submission handling.
frontend/src/pages/EggnogExorcismPage.ts: Food booth detail page showing Eggnog Exorcism info, image, description, and menu with a back-navigation action.
frontend/src/pages/FrostedHauntPage.tsx: Event detail page for the Frosted Haunt, displaying event description, warnings, highlights, and themed imagery.
frontend/src/pages/GingerdeadBakesPage.t: Food booth detail page for Gingerdead Bakes showing its image, description, and menu items with navigation back.
frontend/src/pages/GuestRulesPage.tsx: Displays guest rules for haunted houses or scare zones based on URL hash, with validation and back-navigation handling.
Displays the Hellfire Hot Cocoa food booth with its image, description, and full menu plus navigation back to booth list.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Renders a detailed haunted house preview for Terror Hell Hole with images, descriptions, and a themed section for Vicky's Saw.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Shows the Laser Hell scare zone with its image, location, tagline, and description, including a fallback for missing data.
frontend/src/pages/OpenIceTombPage.tsx: Presents the Open Ice Tomb haunted house with image, description, extreme warning alert, and link to guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/OrnamentOssuaryPage.t: Displays the Ornament Ossuary food booth with its image, description, and full menu plus navigation handling.
frontend/src/pages/SantasHellPage.tsx: Renders the Santa's Hell scare zone with image, extreme warning alert, description, and link to rules.
frontend/src/pages/ScareActorAuditionPag: Form page for submitting scare actor audition applications with validation and Internet Identity login handling.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Displays a sneak‑peek page for the Schoolhouse attraction with image, title, and description.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Renders details and menu for the Sharks Hell food booth with a back‑navigation handler.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Renders details and menu for the Slider Doom food booth with smooth back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: Shows a sneak peek for the Toys Come to Play haunted house with generated imagery and description.
frontend/src/pages/WaxWorksPage.tsx: Displays the Wax Works haunted house page with warnings, description, and navigation to rules.
frontend/src/pages/WrathOfWrappingPage.t: Shows details and menu for the Wrath of Wrapping food booth with smooth navigation back.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Utility functions for comparing dates, getting next dates, and expanding date ranges into daily keys.
frontend/src/utils/slug.ts: Provides a simple slugification function converting text into URL‑friendly strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL or hash params, persist them in sessionStorage, and clear them as needed.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, layout, animations, and enabling plugins like typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Stores the project’s current state, listing homepage pass‑related feature updates, requirements, and metadata.
